'THE BOSS PUT US IN OUR PLACE AT HALF-TIME’
Hector Bellerin on a ‘great talk’ from Arsene Wenger at the interval and a ‘bittersweet’ result


Hector Bellerin described Friday’s result against Liverpool as “bittersweet” - and you can see why.

At 2-0 down we’d have been happy with a point, but at 3-2 up we wanted all three.

So what turned the game on its head? Hector shed some light on that after the game:

“We didn’t start well, they got in front but [at half-time] the boss put us in our place,” he said.

“He told us what we had to do and the team got a great reaction. We scored three quick goals and you could see the belief in the team. But we needed to defend better to keep the score. We couldn’t do it so it’s a bit bittersweet, with being in front but then drawing the game.

“But there are positives, like the belief the team had and how we turned it around.

Hector Bellerin on a ‘great talk’ from Arsene Wenger at the interval and a ‘bittersweet’ result


Hector Bellerin described Friday’s result against Liverpool as “bittersweet” - and you can see why.

At 2-0 down we’d have been happy with a point, but at 3-2 up we wanted all three.

So what turned the game on its head? Hector shed some light on that after the game:

“We didn’t start well, they got in front but [at half-time] the boss put us in our place,” he said.

“He told us what we had to do and the team got a great reaction. We scored three quick goals and you could see the belief in the team. But we needed to defend better to keep the score. We couldn’t do it so it’s a bit bittersweet, with being in front but then drawing the game.

“But there are positives, like the belief the team had and how we turned it around.

“There was a great talk at half-time, there was a lot of belief from the boss and we knew we had it in ourselves,” added Bellerin. “We showed we could turn it around but then we made a mistake at a corner and paid for it. It’s a draw that could be fair for both teams but, with being in front [at 3-2], it’s a bit bittersweet.”

山神被換掩臉惹網民熱議

【now.com體育】阿歷斯山齊士89分鐘被換離場後，被鏡頭發現他在後備席上用手掩臉，即引來網民熱烈討論。

周五阿仙奴對利物浦一戰正選上陣的阿歷斯山齊士（Alexis Sanchez），雖然在比賽中為球隊取得入球，但戰至89分鐘被換出，由禾確特入替，被換出後山神被發現坐在後備席內，用手掩臉，看似非常失望，網民更因這名29歲球員的行為，而在社交網絡Twitter引起熱烈討論。

其中有不少認為山神希望離「廠」，網民@missp000認為這個身體語言顯示自己無能為力，就像一個不想再處於戀愛關係的男人；@bourneblue就認為山神顯然是希望讓他離隊。不過亦有心水清的球迷，@NorwayMonster表示山神經常在後備席都是這個表情，不足為奇。

周五英超優先場上演入球騷，主場的阿仙奴先落後2球，於下半場5分鐘內連轟3球反先，但其後被利物浦由羅拔圖法明奴射入，逼和3:3完場。

Arsenal midfielder Jack Wilshere hopes to build on sterling display against Liverpool

Jack Wilshere is targeting a long run in the Arsenal side after impressing in Arsenal’s thrilling draw with Liverpool.

Wilshere has featured in all of Arsenal's Europa League games this season but made just his third Premier League start of the campaign in the 3-3 draw with Jurgen Klopp's men.

"I feel good you know and I said for ages that I want to be playing in the Premier League," Wilshere said.

"I've played a lot of games in the Europa League and built my fitness up.

"I was patient and we've now got a few injuries and I've managed to get a few games in but I am happy and I want to stay in the team now.

"It's a busy schedule over Christmas. There are a lot of games where we are going to need all of the squad so I am happy."

Arsenal boss Wenger was pleased with Wilshere's performance and says the England midfielder in in excellent physical condition.

"He's better now than he was in the last two or three years," Wenger added.

"I think he is positive overall and is in a very good shape at the moment."
